asset.title: Two Client Fresh Room
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: A clear, side-by-side demonstration of two clients synchronizing in real-time as an AI agent reconciles a shared spreadsheet. The workflow is complete and highly credible.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows two clients and an agent reconciling a sheet, though the dense UI requires close attention.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the initial empty variance column, the agent command, and the live synchronized updates.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean side-by-side layout, though the dark theme and dense text panels feel slightly crowded.

consistency.evidence: Aligns well with NodeRoom's core concept of collaborative, agent-assisted spreadsheets.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic screen capture showing real-time multi-client updates without artificial edits.

legibility.evidence: Text is small in the dual-pane view, but the temporary zoom-ins help readability.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for collaborative financial modeling and automated reconciliation use cases.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately shows the agent's processing state and the subsequent cell updates.

observedEvidence: Empty variance column in Q3 sheet
Agent command execution (/ask reconcile Q3 variance)
Live, synchronized cell updates across both clients

defects.observed: The text in the chat input and spreadsheet cells is quite small and hard to read in the dual-client layout.
defects.fix: Consider slightly increasing the default UI font size or applying a tighter crop on the active areas.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom's agent reconcile a shared Q3 variance sheet live across multiple connected clients.
